new.name: Blind-Trust-CVE-2024-21413-Research
new.description: A security research tool for simulating targeted phishing campaigns  using CVE-2024-21413 (Moniker Link).

update.name: CVE-2025-32463_chwoot
update.description: 🔍 Demonstrate the CVE-2025-32463 privilege-escalation flaw in sudo's chroot feature with this minimal, reproducible proof of concept environment.

update.name: CVE-2025-31258-PoC
update.description: 🔓 Explore CVE-2025-31258 with this PoC demonstrating partial sandbox escape using RemoteViewServices for practical 1-day security practice.

update.name: CVE-2025-54424
update.description: CVE-2025-54424: 1Panel TLS client cert bypass enables RCE via forged CN 'panel_client' using a bundled scanning and exploitation tool. Affected: <= v2.0.5. 🔐

update.name: NimbusPWN-CVE-2022-29799-29800
update.description: Demonstrate local privilege escalation in networkd-dispatcher via CVE-2022-29799 and CVE-2022-29800 using this C proof of concept.

update.name: CVE-2026-41940-Exploit-PoC
update.description: Test authentication bypass vulnerabilities in cPanel and WHM using this proof of concept exploit tool written in Go.

update.name: CVE-2026-31431-Linux-Copy-Fail
update.description: Exploit CVE-2026-31431 on Linux using a Rust implementation to achieve local privilege escalation via an arbitrary page cache write primitive.

update.name: CVE-2026-31802
update.description: Demonstrate and analyze the CVE-2026-31802 path traversal vulnerability in npm tar, enabling arbitrary file overwrite via symlink extraction.

update.name: cve-2025-66398
update.description: Demonstrate exploitation of Signal K Server CVE-2025-66398 allowing unauthenticated attackers to inject backdoor and enable remote code execution.

update.name: Estudo-de-Caso-CVE-2024-21413
update.description: Um estudo de caso do CVE-2024-21413. Usado como parâmetro a sala do TryHackMe Moniker Link (CVE-2024-21413). Feito edições com claude code no exploit.

update.name: CVE-2024-21413
update.description: CVE-2024-21413 | Microsoft Outlook Remote Code Execution Vulnerability PoC

update.name: redis_exploit
update.description: 🔍 Explore and test the CVE-2025-49844 (RediShell) vulnerability in Redis with this practical lab environment for secure education and research.

update.description: Expose and detail an unauthenticated stored XSS vulnerability in the Google Cloud Vertex AI Python SDK affecting versions 1.98.0 to 1.130.9.

update.name: CVE-2025-69985
update.description: Exploit CVE-2025-69985 to bypass authentication and execute remote commands on FUXA versions ≤ 1.2.8 via the /api/runscript endpoint.

update.name: CVE-2026-2441-PoC
update.description: Demonstrate a proof-of-concept exploit for CVE-2026-2441, a high-risk Chrome use-after-free vulnerability in the Blink CSS engine.

update.name: CVE-2026-20841
update.description: 🛠 Demonstrate remote code execution in Windows Notepad via markdown links exploiting unsecured URL protocols.

update.name: CVE-2026-20841-PoC
update.description: 🛠 Demonstrate remote code execution in Windows Notepad versions below 11.2510 using the CVE-2026-20841 proof of concept.

update.name: CVE-2026-24061
update.description: 🚨 Exploit CVE-2026-24061, a critical remote authentication bypass in GNU inetutils-telnetd, for instant root shell access without authentication.

update.name: CVE-2025-68921
update.description: 🔍 Identify and understand the local privilege escalation vulnerability (CVE-2025-68921) in Nahimic audio software, impacting many gaming laptops.

update.name: CVE-2025-14847
update.description: 🛠 Exploit the CVE-2025-14847 vulnerability in MongoDB to disclose sensitive heap memory using a Python script that analyzes responses for new leaked data.

update.name: Fsociety-CVE-2024-0670-CheckMK-LPE
update.description: 🔍 Exploit CVE-2024-0670 in CheckMK agents for local privilege escalation using a robust C++ tool designed for security professionals.

update.description: 🛡️ Scan and assess vulnerabilities in Next.js/Waku with the CVE-2025-55182-Scanner, combining static and dynamic analysis for robust security.

update.name: CVE-2025-55182
update.description: 🚨 Exploit CVE-2025-55182 to demonstrate RCE in React Server Functions, highlighting risks from insecure prototype references in Next.js applications.

update.name: CVE-2025-55182-scanner
update.description: 🔍 Scan for CVE-2025-55182 risks in React Server Components with this non-intrusive tool that helps detect critical vulnerabilities in your applications.

update.name: CVE-2025-55182-research
update.description: 🛡️ Explore CVE-2025-55182, a critical RCE vulnerability in React's Flight Protocol, demonstrating exploitation techniques and mitigation strategies.
